name: Asterisk MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Asterisk — the open-source VoIP PBX and telephony platform. Enables AI agents to manage Asterisk phone systems through the AMI (Asterisk Manager Interface): originate calls, control call routing, query channel status, manage voicemail, and interact with the PBX programmatically.
use_cases: Originating calls and controlling call routing from AI telephony agents
Monitoring active calls and channel status from operations agents
Automating IVR and call queue management from customer service agents
Building AI-powered call center automation on Asterisk infrastructure
not_for: Organizations using Twilio, AWS Connect, or other cloud telephony (Asterisk-specific)
Teams without an Asterisk PBX deployment
best_when: A telecom engineer or IT team managing an Asterisk PBX wants AI agents to automate call routing, originate calls, and monitor telephony operations — reducing manual PBX management overhead.
avoid_when: You use cloud telephony platforms. Asterisk requires self-hosted PBX infrastructure and telephony expertise.

auth.notes: Asterisk AMI credentials required. Configure AMI manager account in Asterisk's manager.conf with appropriate permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Asterisk is free open source. MCP server is free open source.
pricing.paid_tiers: None (commercial Asterisk support from Digium/Sangoma available separately)
pricing.notes: Asterisk is free open source (GPL). MCP server is free. Infrastructure costs for PBX hosting apply.

performance.rate_limits: AMI connection limits by Asterisk configuration; typically adequate

known_agent_gotchas: REAL TELEPHONY: Call origination creates actual phone calls — test in lab environment first
AMI interface varies by Asterisk version — verify compatibility with your Asterisk build
Asterisk AMI commands require careful understanding of dial plan — consult telephony expert
AMI connections should be restricted to localhost — never expose AMI port externally without TLS
agent_readiness.security_notes: Asterisk AMI provides full PBX control including call origination and routing. Restrict AMI access to localhost or VPN. AMI credentials must be secured. Real telephony effects.

security_score_components.security_notes: Full PBX control. Restrict AMI to localhost. AMI credentials required. Real call effects. Never expose AMI externally.
